name: Royal Silverware Set
description: A polished set of the queen's silverware. Worth more for its sentimental value than its weight.

name: Sealed Letter of Innocence
description: A wax-sealed letter from the librarian, dated and signed, exonerating a prisoner held in the castle's lower cells.

name: Captain's Token
description: A small bronze coin engraved with the castle crest. Carrying it marks you as a friend to the castle guard.
